scripts.watch: concurrently 'node esbuild.mjs --watch' 'cd server && npm run watch -- --preserveWatchOutput'
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server

anvil.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Controls the maximum number of problems produced by the server.

anvil.projectRoot.description: Controls the project root path. Defaults to the workspace root.

anvil.executablePath.description: Path to the Anvil compiler binary. Defaults to 'anvil' in your PATH.

anvil.showTimingInfo.description: Controls how clock-cycle timing and expression lifetime information is shown in the editor.

oneOf.description: `true` enables timing info as condensed inlay hints and on hover. `false` disables all timing info.
Fine-grained control over where clock-cycle timing and lifetime information appears.

asInlayHints.description: Show clock-cycle timings and expression lifetimes as inline annotations in the editor gutter.

enumDescriptions: Do not show timing info as inlay hints.
Show timing info as compact prefixed and postfixed inlay hints.
Show timing info in full phrases as prefixed and postfixed inlay hints.

oneOf.description: `true` is equivalent to `"condensed"`. `false` is equivalent to `"none"`.

onHover.description: Show clock-cycle timing and lifetime information when hovering over an expression.

onAutocomplete.description: Show clock-cycle timing and lifetime information in autocomplete documentation popups.

anvil.showSyntaxHelp.description: Controls whether explanations of Anvil syntax are shown in hover tooltips and autocomplete popups.

oneOf.description: `true` enables explanations on hover and for built-in Anvil keyword completions. `false` disables all explanations.
Fine-grained control over where Anvil concept explanations appear.

onHover.description: Show Anvil concept explanations when hovering over nodes.

onAutocomplete.description: Show Anvil concept explanations in autocomplete documentation popups.

enumDescriptions: Never show explanations in autocomplete popups.
Show explanations only for built-in Anvil keywords and operators.
Show explanations for all completions, including user-defined identifiers.

oneOf.description: `true` is equivalent to `"all"`. `false` is equivalent to `"none"`.

includeExamples.description: When `true`, code examples from the Anvil language reference are included in syntax help explanations. Only applies when syntax explanations are active (`onHover` or `onAutocomplete`).
